title: Gla
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Gla''' were buildings used by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] to breed [[amphistaff]]s. They were shaped like hexagons and had [[Mica (mineral)|mica]] roofs. One such building resided on the [[Terraforming/Legends|Vongformed]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] in [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]''
